choose.when:
<set-variable name="promptContent" value="@{
                    try {
                        var body = context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
                        string promptContent = "";
                        var contentToken = body["messages"]?.Last?["content"];
                        if (body["input"] != null) {
                            promptContent = body["input"].ToString();
                        } else if (contentToken != null)
                        {
                            promptContent = contentToken.ToString();
                        }
                        return promptContent;
                    } catch {
                        return "";
                    }
                }" />
                
                
                
                    https://api.us1.zseclipse.net/v1/detection/execute-policy
                    POST
                    
                        Bearer {{aiguard-api-key}}
                    
                    
                        application/json
                    
                    @{
                        var prompt = (string)context.Variables["promptContent"];
                        var requestBody = new JObject(
                            new JProperty("content", prompt),
                            new JProperty("direction", "IN"),
                            new JProperty("policyId", 760)
                        );
                        return requestBody.ToString();
                    }
                
                
                
                
                    
                        
                            <when condition="@(((IResponse)context.Variables["aiguardPromptScan"]).Body.As(preserveContent: true)["action"].ToString() == "BLOCK")">
                                <set-variable name="errorBody" value="@{
                                    var panwResponse = ((IResponse)context.Variables["aiguardPromptScan"]).Body.As(preserveContent: true);
                                    var response = new JObject();
                                    response.Add("error", "🛡️ ZSCALER AI GUARD: REQUEST BLOCKED");
                                    
                                    var details = new JObject();
                                    var detectorResponses = panwResponse["detectorResponses"] as JObject;
                                    
                                    if (detectorResponses != null)
                                    {
                                        foreach (JProperty prop in detectorResponses.Properties())
                                        {
                                            var detectorData = prop.Value as JObject;
                                            if (detectorData != null && detectorData["triggered"] != null && (bool)detectorData["triggered"] == true)
                                            {
                                                details.Add(prop.Name, "Content blocked by " + prop.Name + " detector");
                                            }
                                        }                                    
                                    }
                                    
                                    response.Add("details", details);
                                    return response.ToString();
                                }" />
                                
                                
                                    
                                    
                                        application/json
                                    
                                    @(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("errorBody"))

<set-variable name="responseContent" value="@{
                    try {
                        var body = context.Response.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
                        string responseContent = "";
                        var choicesToken = ((JArray)body["choices"])?.Last?["message"]?["content"];
                        if (choicesToken != null) 
                        {
                            responseContent = choicesToken.ToString();
                        }
                        return responseContent;
                    } catch {
                        return "";
                    }
                }" />
                
                
                
                    https://api.us1.zseclipse.net/v1/detection/execute-policy
                    POST
                    
                        Bearer {{aiguard-api-key}}
                    
                    
                        application/json
                    
                    @{
                        var response = (string)context.Variables["responseContent"];
                        var requestBody = new JObject(
                            new JProperty("content", response),
                            new JProperty("direction", "OUT"),
                            new JProperty("policyId", 760)
                        );
                        return requestBody.ToString();
                    }
                
                
                
                
                    
                        
                            <when condition="@(((IResponse)context.Variables["aiguardResponseScan"]).Body.As(preserveContent: true)["action"].ToString() == "BLOCK")">
                                <set-variable name="errorBody" value="@{
                                    var panwResponse = ((IResponse)context.Variables["aiguardResponseScan"]).Body.As(preserveContent: true);
                                    var response = new JObject();
                                    response.Add("error", "🛡️ ZSCALER AI GUARD: RESPONSE BLOCKED");
                                    
                                    var details = new JObject();
                                    var detectorResponses = panwResponse["detectorResponses"] as JObject;
                                    
                                    if (detectorResponses != null)
                                    {
                                        foreach (JProperty prop in detectorResponses.Properties())
                                        {
                                            var detectorData = prop.Value as JObject;
                                            if (detectorData != null && detectorData["triggered"] != null && (bool)detectorData["triggered"] == true)
                                            {
                                                details.Add(prop.Name, "Content blocked by " + prop.Name + " detector");
                                            }
                                        }                                    
                                    }
                                    
                                    response.Add("details", details);
                                    return response.ToString();
                                }" />
                                
                                
                                    
                                    
                                        application/json
                                    
                                    @(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("errorBody"))
